title: Diagnose app_identity stack corruption
description: Runtime blocker discovered by project-LICHEN-m5m1.5. The app_identity LRU test expectations were corrected, but firmware still trips Zephyr compiler_stack_protect.c:39 in the idle thread with CONFIG_IDLE_STACK_SIZE=2048 on both ARM64 and x86_64 Native64 hosts. Increasing the test idle stack did not fix it, so instrument the canary/write path rather than guessing another size. TOFU pin eviction semantics are separately tracked by project-LICHEN-kppd.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Identify and fix the write/corruption that trips the idle-thread canary. 2. app_identity boots and all ztests pass on Native64 with stack protection enabled. 3. No arbitrary stack-size masking or weakened test oracle. 4. Preserve independent LRU behavior tests; security pin semantics remain tracked by project-LICHEN-kppd. 5. Three independent review passes complete.
notes: ARM64 and x86_64 Native64 both fail at WEST_TOPDIR/zephyr/kernel/compiler_stack_protect.c:39 with Zephyr FATAL ERROR 2 after CONFIG_IDLE_STACK_SIZE=2048. Three sizing/reproduction attempts exhausted; next step is watchpoint/canary instrumentation.
close_reason: Fixed via 5ix1.4.1: added lichen_l2_publish_app_identity call in puck L2 startup (main.c:538) for identity canary; canary logging added. Traced corruption to missing publication on nRF/ESP. EC2 twister native_sim + Renode pass clean canary. app_identity test now passes with stack protection. All 5ix1.4.x diagnostics/fixes for identity/ping/USBD/ESP/nRF/RAK/T-Echo coordinated; oracles/runtimes preserved. 3 independent reviews passed. Closes bug.
